articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: A country-by-country glance at Pope Leo XIV's trip to Africa - NPR
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV's four-nation, 11-day trip to Africa is so dizzying in its complexity it recalls some of the globetrotting odysseys of St. John Paul II in his early years.
articles.content:
Pope Leo XIV's four-nation, 11-day trip to Africa is so dizzying in its complexity it recalls some of the globetrotting odysseys of St. John Paul II in his early years.
